title: Insert negative number with scientific notation
description:
I'm using Virtuoso 07.20.3212 on Ubuntu. If I do an update like:
sparql INSERT INTO <http://test>{
  <http://test/a> <http://test/value> -5.0e5
}

the negative sign is ignored by Virtuoso, the actual triple inserted is:
http://test/a http://test/value                   500000
this has caused huge mess in our system......
Can someone explain why it is the case?
key_bug_features: Insert negative number with scientific notation
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value FLOAT NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (2, NULL);
UPDATE test_table SET value = value * -1 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE value < 0;
